title: P2: Implement EquipItem, ActivateBlock, AttackEntity, and other missing tools
description: Missing tools that block common autonomous behaviors: EquipItem (change held item without mining), ActivateBlock (open doors, press buttons, levers), AttackEntity (direct melee), UseItem (right-click with held item), DropItem, LookAt (orient toward target). Each is ~30 lines JS + ~50 lines C# and dramatically expands what ad-hoc LLM plans can express.
